inline_comments.message:
2.6.7 been released
https://www.ruby-lang.org/en/news/2021/04/05/ruby-2-6-7-released/
as well as 2.7.x too
https://www.ruby-lang.org/en/downloads/releases/

the problem is that we are limited by the alpine release that we inherit from integration docker,
I propose to update to the latest integration base docker (this way we also get a newer python)
and use the latest ruby available for that alpine release : 2.7.2-r1
https://pkgs.alpinelinux.org/packages?name=ruby&branch=v3.12&arch=x86_64
